title: Vance to visit Pak for second round of peace talks as ceasefire deadline nears: Report
summary_full: US Vice President JD Vance is heading to Islamabad for crucial talks with Iran, aiming to avert a looming conflict as a fragile ceasefire nears its end. Washington has warned of renewed bombing if no agreement is reached, though a deadline extension is possible if progress is seen. Iran's participation was delayed by internal pressure, but approval was eventually granted.
